_meta.source: 2026-06-13 Apple and Huawei AI leadership follow-up
_meta.note: Candidate-level roster seeds. New people stay candidate; existing John Giannandrea is updated only to remove stale currentTitle.

seeds.name: Amar Subramanya
seeds.reason: Apple announced in 2025 that Amar Subramanya joined as vice president of AI, reporting to Craig Federighi and leading Apple Foundation Models, ML research, AI safety, and evaluation.

seeds.name: John Giannandrea
seeds.currentTitle: Former Senior Vice President, Machine Learning and AI Strategy @ Apple
seeds.reason: Former Apple machine learning and AI strategy leader; Apple announced he stepped down and would retire after an advisory period.

seeds.name: 张平安
seeds.currentTitle: 常务董事、华为云计算 BU CEO @ 华为
seeds.reason: 华为年报确认张平安为华为常务董事、华为云计算 BU CEO；适合作为华为云与盘古大模型业务落地负责人候选。

seeds.name: 田奇
seeds.currentTitle: 华为云人工智能领域首席科学家
seeds.reason: 华为技术专栏明确称田奇为华为云人工智能领域首席科学家，并将其与盘古大模型研发和产业落地相连。
